// 초기 수행함수 this.initMainCbnNtrltPollution = function() { // 기본 설정 var mainCbnNtrltFillUrl = "url(#" + grpMainCbnNtrltPollutionObjectRectPattern.getID() + ")";
document.getElementById(grpMainCbnNtrltPollutionObjectRect.getID()).setAttribute("fill", mainCbnNtrltFillUrl);
document.querySelector(`#${this.getID()} #grpMainCbnNtrltPollutionImage`).setAttribute("xlink:href", this.grpMainCbnNtrltPollutionImageHref);
var mainCbnNtrltPollution = document.querySelector(`#${this.getID()} #grpMainCbnNtrltPollution`); if (options.width && options.width != "") { mainCbnNtrltPollution.setAttribute("width", options.width); } if (options.height && options.height != "") { mainCbnNtrltPollution.setAttribute("height", options.height); } };
